critic_justifications.NY Times: Reviewer praised the production's campy charm and strong performances, though noted it was a faithful recreation rather than reinvention.
critic_justifications.Variety: Called it a delightful, energetic revival that captures the show's cult appeal with solid direction and engaging cast.
critic_justifications.NY Post: Lauded the production as a gleeful, darkly comic romp with excellent performances and design.
critic_justifications.TheaterMania: Noted the revival's strengths in humor and spectacle while finding some pacing issues in the second act.
critic_justifications.BroadwayWorld: Praised the cast and production values as a worthy return of the cult classic to off-Broadway.

audience_justifications.Show-Score: Audience consensus has been strongly positive with consistent A-range ratings throughout the show's run.
audience_justifications.Broadway Scorecard: Community ratings reflect high enthusiasm for the production with predominantly positive audience reception.
audience_justifications.Broadway.com: Audience reviews have been favorable, with viewers appreciating the campy horror-comedy and performances.
